page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.16xlarge is a storage-intensive server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The x86_64 architecture is paired with 256 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

A key characteristic of this instance is its integrated local storage, which consists of 7679 GB of SSD capacity. This high-density local storage is complemented by a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The server does not include any GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the substantial local SSD storage capacity and dedicated CPU allocation, this server is designed for storage-heavy and database workloads. The 1.0 thread per core configuration ensures consistent compute performance without hyper-threading overhead. This resource density makes the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for high-throughput database operations, large-scale data warehousing, and local file processing tasks that require high-capacity, low-latency local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.16xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, alongside 256 GB of RAM, establishing a 4.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The instance features a substantial local storage allocation of 7679 GB of SSD capacity and a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. With no GPU accelerators present, the hardware configuration is tailored for high-capacity local data processing. The dedicated CPU allocation with a single thread per core ensures predictable compute performance. This server is suited for database hosting, data warehousing, and storage-intensive enterprise workloads requiring large local storage volumes and consistent processing power.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2gne.16xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB of RAM, 7679 GB of local SSD storage, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth for storage-heavy workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core server featuring 7679 GB of local SSD storage and 20 Gbps network bandwidth for storage-intensive database workloads.

7679 GB of integrated local SSD storage
